# WCOIN.CASINO

> WCOIN.CASINO is the on-chain intelligence layer for iGaming — the web's most complete, independent, real-time dataset on crypto casinos and on-chain gambling. All data is derived from public blockchain activity and reputable third-party sources; nothing is fabricated.

WCOIN.CASINO tracks crypto-casino and on-chain-gambling activity across 11+ blockchains (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Tron, Solana, BNB Chain, Polygon, Arbitrum, Base, Avalanche, and more). It is free to use.

## What WCOIN.CASINO covers

- **On-chain transaction volume** per casino — real deposit/withdrawal flow indexed directly from the chains, counting mainstream tokens (stablecoins + majors) only.
- **All-chain proof-of-reserves** — each casino's live on-chain wallet balances summed across every chain (via Arkham entity attribution), so reserves can't be cherry-picked. Includes a 7-day reserve trend and a drawdown ("draining wallets") alert.
- **Trust & reputation ratings** — blended from casino.guru Safety Index, Trustpilot, casino.org editorial and AskGamblers, plus complaint/unresolved-dispute counts, into a single 0–100 reputation score.
- **On-chain prediction markets** — Polymarket plus 90+ prediction-market and yield-lottery protocols (live odds, traded volume, TVL via DefiLlama).
- **Gambling-streamer analytics** — live status, viewers, followers and casino affiliation for streamers on Kick, Twitch and YouTube, plus a streamer→casino sponsorship graph.
- **Casino directory** — a large vetted catalogue of crypto casinos with site/contact verification.
- **Casino token economics** — price, market cap, FDV, volume and buyback-and-burn flags for casinos that issue a token.

## Key facts

- Independent third-party analytics platform (not a casino; does not operate gambling).
- Data is on-chain and verifiable; reserves come from public wallet balances.
- 100% free; sign-in (email only, no password) unlocks alerts, votes and the API.
- Headline coverage and live totals are available at the public API endpoint `/api/coverage`.

## Primary pages

- Home / data-coverage overview: https://wcoin.casino/
- Casino leaderboard (volume, reserves, trust): https://wcoin.casino/app/casinos
- Trust & all-chain reserves: https://wcoin.casino/app/sentiment
- On-chain prediction markets: https://wcoin.casino/app/markets
- Casino directory: https://wcoin.casino/app/directory
- Streamer monitoring: https://wcoin.casino/app/streamers
